message:
fix(record,test): tighten Finalizing admission to reject child regions and complete bulkhead cancel test

Region admission (src/record/region.rs):
- Clarify that Finalizing state admits only same-region cleanup work
  (tasks and obligation bookkeeping), not new child-region creation.
  Child regions are exclusively admitted while the parent is Open,
  enforced via the existing can_spawn() predicate in add_child().
- Update doc comments on can_accept_work(), the concurrency-safety
  argument, and the closed-region rejection test descriptions to
  accurately reflect this tighter invariant.
- Add test: child_admission_rejected_when_finalizing — verifies
  add_child returns AdmissionError::Closed during Finalizing state.
- Extend admission_allowed_when_finalizing test to also verify
  try_reserve_obligation succeeds (not just add_task).

Bulkhead cancel test (tests/bulkhead_cancel_bug.rs):
- Replace incomplete stub (trailing comments with no assertions) with
  a proper test that verifies head-of-line-blocking resolution:
  construct a Bulkhead with max_concurrent=10, consume 7 permits to
  leave 3 available, enqueue A wanting 5 (blocks), enqueue B wanting
  2 (blocks behind A), cancel A, then assert B is granted.
- The previous test had max_concurrent=3 with no pre-consumed permits
  and ended with dangling comments instead of assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
